body_txt: A suspect has been arrested and is being interrogated by the police. Suddenly, they attack themselves or trick the officer into attacking them, and then falsely sue the officer of Police Brutality with the help of an Ambulance Chaser . A Sub-Trope of Wounded Gazelle Gambit which occurs in Police Procedurals . Not to be confused with Good Cop/Bad Cop , where police use the threat of brutality as a gambit. If a person isn't in custody but still wants to pull this off, he may try to SWAT himself to get the police to storm his property and then claim later they hurt him when they did so. See also Arrested for Heroism . Not related to Suicide by Cop , where the individual concerned is trying to force a police officer to kill them.
